comments.body: Green test buttons, @mheon, @rhatdan, @baude or @nalind if I could get a LGTM, I'd like to get this merged.
This resets the Buildah upstream version to a dev, we just cut 1.5 yesterday.  @vrothberg if you're around today, I'd happily steal a LGTM from you too.
